title: Ubiquiti UniFi Cloud Key G2+, 1TB
description: Manage your UniFi networking and video devices simultaneously with the new multi-application UniFi Cloud Key G2 Plus . Designed for easy deployment, the Cloud Key G2 Plus can be quickly configured over Bluetooth using the UniFi mobile applications. The front panel display shows vital system stats for your UniFi networking hardware and UniFi video cameras. For video storage, it also includes a 1 TB HDD , which is upgradeable to 5 TB Thanks to the 8-core ARM processor, the UCK-G2-PLUS has up to 4 times the performance of the older UC-CK model. Manages up to 50 UniFi units or 20 cameras Easy setup with UniFi and UniFi Protect mobile apps Powered by 802.3af PoE or QC 2.0 USB-C 1 TB 2.5" hard drive included (upgradeable to 5 TB) Front panel display for at-a-glance system details
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af Power type PoE, USB-C Max. power consumption [W] 18 Power via connector/terminal 9V / 2A Physical characteristics Design Desktop Fans No Buttons Reset, power Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 35 Weight [g] 5 Width [mm] 131 Height [mm] 27 Depth [mm] 134 Hardware CPU 8-core 64-bit ARM RAM [MB] 3
